headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -99.4)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 126% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 145 quotes and 121 at strong intensity - people are expressing anger and annoyance very forcefully today.

• At 74.4, frustration levels remain well above average for the period, though down from yesterday's peak of 98.2.

• Both fears and optimism stay suppressed below their historical averages, keeping the overall mood negative.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
